description_long: This is a rectangular, hard-sided toolbox with a hinged lid and a robust, utilitarian design. The exterior appears to be made of molded plastic with reinforced edges and corners for durability. The lid features a visible handle and a latch mechanism, and there is a circular brand logo or label on the top surface. The interior is hollow, providing ample storage space for tools or equipment, and the opening is wide for easy access. The surface finish is matte with some subtle texture, and the overall color is a dark gray with lighter gray highlights and a small yellow accent near the latch.
description: A sturdy, rectangular plastic toolbox with a hinged lid, handle, latch, and a visible brand logo on top. The main color is dark gray with lighter accents and a yellow latch detail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open compartment, latch, and part of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the lid and the handle's position on top.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back hinge and the full extent of the lid and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the lid and handle visible.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed plastic handle, rectangular in shape, integrated into the lid for carrying; no visible ergonomic padding or folding mechanism.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Single plastic clasp latch on the front, no visible keyhole or combination lock.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular logo or label is visible on the top center of the lid, with unreadable text or symbols.
attribute_compartment_configuration: One large main compartment visible, no internal trays or dividers apparent from the images.
